name: Cinnamon Apple Pork Tenderloin
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Place the pork tenderloin in a roasting pan or casserole dish with a lid.
3. In a bowl, combine the remaining ingredients and stir.
4. Spoon the apple mixture around the pork tenderloin.
5. Cover and bake for 40 minutes.
6. Remove the lid and spoon the apple mixture over the tenderloin.
7. Return to the oven and bake an additional 15-20 minutes until the tenderloin is browned and cooked through.
1 serving = 267 calories, 3 medium-fat protein + 1 fruit; 13 grams carbohydrate, 10 grams fat, 148 mg sodium
Adapted from Quick & Easy Diabetic Menus by Betty Wedman (1993), shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier in Feb 94.
